Command.Name: extract
Command.Description: Scan Blazor projects for IStringLocalizer usage, extract source strings, and export to a translation file (i18next JSON, PO, or generic JSON).

Argument.Name: path
Argument.Description: Root directory of the solution or project to scan. Defaults to current directory

Option.Description: Exit with error code 1 when duplicate translation keys are found (useful for CI pipelines)
Export format: i18next (default, Crowdin i18next JSON), po (GNU Gettext with source refs), json (full-fidelity debug)
Output raw JSON to stdout instead of rendered tables. Auto-enabled when stdout is piped
Filter to specific locales. Repeatable (-l da -l es-MX). Omit to include all discovered locales
Strategy for duplicate translation keys (same key, different source text). 'first' (default) keeps the first-seen source text. 'skip' omits the key entirely
Output path: a file (e.g. out.po) or directory (e.g. ./translations). Auto-detected via extension. Omit to write to stdout
Path style for source references. 'relative' (default) emits paths relative to the project root. 'absolute' preserves full filesystem paths
One or more explicit project directories to scan. Repeatable (-p dir1 -p dir2). Skips automatic project discovery
Suppress inline locale output (.For() per-locale source texts). Show source-language entries only
Print per-project scanning progress to stderr

Command.Name: inspect
Command.Description: Show all detected IStringLocalizer calls and the resulting translation entries. Useful for debugging what the scanner sees before exporting.

Argument.Name: path
Argument.Description: Root directory of the solution or project to scan. Defaults to current directory

Option.Description: Output raw JSON to stdout instead of rendered tables. Auto-enabled when stdout is piped
Filter to specific locales. Repeatable (-l da -l es-MX). Omit to include all discovered locales
Path style for source references. 'relative' (default) emits paths relative to the project root. 'absolute' preserves full filesystem paths
One or more explicit project directories to scan. Repeatable (-p dir1 -p dir2). Skips automatic project discovery
Suppress inline locale output (.For() per-locale source texts). Show source-language entries only
